spec_match.rationale: Incredible comparison matrix mapping four levels of eagerness side-by-side, presenting trigger event loops, typical delays, and average hit rates.

interactive.rationale: Rich interactive simulator that fires mouseover/pointerdown/touchstart events to trace dynamic arming and prefetch state transitions in a live timeline.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment. Clarifies the touch-based mobile moderate 138 optimization vs legacy hover limits.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers DOM injection, rules parsed parsing, touch vs pointer trigger timings, and detailed delay estimates.

references.rationale: The `see also` section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5079361929347072 directly.

design_system.rationale: Extremely professional grids, contrasting interactive states, clean custom timelines, and full WCAG contrast.

summary: A highly educational and aesthetically stunning eagerness levels comparator with real-time click/hover interactive telemetry, though marred by a mismatched ChromeStatus link.
